metaTitle: EXIF Remover — Remove GPS & Metadata from Photos (Free & Private)
metaDescription: Protect your privacy by removing hidden EXIF metadata from your photos. Delete GPS location, camera settings, and timestamps instantly in your browser. No upload required.
introSummary: Our professional-grade EXIF remover is designed for anyone needing to remove GPS from photos instantly for secure photo sharing. Whether you need to strip photo timestamps for a resume or delete camera metadata before posting on social media, this offline-first tool ensures your privacy without any cloud uploads.

contextUsage.title: For Marketplaces
contextUsage.desc: Selling on eBay, Craigslist, or Facebook? Remove your home address from product photos before posting.

contextUsage.title: For Professional Use
contextUsage.desc: Strip camera serial numbers, lens settings, and edit history from headshots or portfolio images.

contextUsage.title: For Social Media Safety
contextUsage.desc: Safely share vacation or family photos on Reddit and public forums by stripping precise GPS coordinates.

howto.description: Click the upload area or drag and drop your photo (JPG, JPEG, PNG, WebP). Your file is processed locally and never leaves your device.
Our tool automatically scans and displays hidden EXIF data, such as GPS coordinates, camera model, and the exact date/time of capture.
With one click, the tool strips away all identified metadata headers while keeping the original image pixels 100% untouched.
Save the sanitized version. It's now safe to share online without revealing your physical location or technical device details.

why: 100% Private — Unlike other tools, your sensitive photos never leave your browser or touch our servers.
Zero Quality Loss — We only strip the hidden text header. Your image resolution and colors remain 100% original.
Remove Precise GPS Location — Instantly hide your home address, hotel, or office coordinates from any shared image.
No Cloud Re-encoding — Most online cleaners re-compress your photo; we don't. Your file stays crisp and clear.
Works Completely Offline — Essential for privacy-conscious users who need a secure metadata cleaner on the go.
No Registration & No Limits — A 100% free utility designed for speed, privacy, and unlimited daily use.

faq.q: What exactly is EXIF data and why is it risky?
faq.a: EXIF (Exchangeable Image File Format) is metadata hidden in your photos. It includes technical settings, but more importantly, it often contains your exact GPS coordinates. Sharing this online can reveal your home address to strangers.

faq.q: Will stripping metadata reduce my photo's resolution?
faq.a: No. Metadata is stored in a separate 'header' section of the file. Our tool specifically targets this header without touching the image data, ensuring your photo quality is never compromised.

faq.q: Does this tool work on iPhone, Android, and DSLR photos?
faq.a: Yes! Smartphones and modern cameras are the biggest sources of tagged photos. This tool is fully compatible with mobile browsers and all major digital camera formats.

faq.q: Can I audit my privacy before deleting?
faq.a: Absolutely. Our tool provides a full preview of the detected metadata so you can audit exactly what information (like camera model or location) is currently embedded.

faq.q: How does this compare to other online EXIF cleaners?
faq.a: Most online tools require an upload, which puts your privacy at risk. Hugdot processes everything 'on-device' (client-side), making it the most secure way to clean your photos.

technicalSpecs.useCase: Comprehensive stripping of all hidden image metadata layers
Prevents exact location tracking from shared vacation or home photos
Your data never leaves your device—privacy by design
Maintains 1:1 original visual quality with zero artifacts
Supports all common smartphone and professional camera file types

troubleshooting: No metadata found? Photos from social media (WhatsApp, Instagram) often have metadata auto-removed. We'll alert you if no headers are detected.
File size unchanged? Metadata headers are tiny (a few KB). Since we don't re-compress your image, a clean file will be nearly identical in size.
Large file handling? Stripping headers from 30MB+ high-res images may take a second in your browser memory.
proTips: Run every 'Marketplace' photo through this tool to ensure buyers don't see your exact address in the image metadata.
Use the 'Preview' feature as a privacy audit—see which lens or camera settings were used on photos from years ago.
Combine with our 'Image Blur' tool if you need to hide both digital tracking data (EXIF) and visual info like license plates.
